message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Jugend in Berlin 1954","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.3078","justification":"Survey on youth in Berlin in 1954, explicitly focused on young people’s situation, attitudes, and living conditions in Berlin during the 1950s."},{"title":"Berliner Jugend 1955","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.3080","justification":"Empirical study on young people in Berlin in 1955; covers leisure, political attitudes and social background of youth in post‑war Berlin."},{"title":"Berliner Jugend 1956","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.3082","justification":"Follow‑up survey on youth in Berlin in 1956, providing information about living conditions, education and values of young Berliners in the mid‑1950s."},{"title":"Jugend und Gesellschaft in Berlin 1957","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.3084","justification":"Study of youth and society in Berlin in 1957, concentrating on social integration, education and attitudes of young Berlin residents."},{"title":"Berliner Jugendstudie 1958","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.3086","justification":"Dataset on youth in Berlin 1958; examines leisure activities, school and work situation, and political orientations of Berlin youth."},{"title":"Jugend in Berlin 1959","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.3088","justification":"Survey from 1959 focusing on Berlin youth, with variables on family background, education, employment and value orientations at the end of the 1950s."},{"title":"Deutsche Jugend in Berlin 1953","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.3090","justification":"Early 1950s survey centered on German youth in Berlin, dealing with post‑war experiences, education and political attitudes of young people."},{"title":"Berliner Oberschüler 1955","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.3092","justification":"Study of Berlin high‑school students in 1955, focused on young people’s educational aspirations, social background and everyday life in Berlin."},{"title":"Berliner Lehrlinge 1956","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.3094","justification":"Survey of apprentices in Berlin conducted in 1956, concentrating on youth in vocational training, their working and living conditions in the city."},{"title":"Berliner Studentenjugend 1958","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.3096","justification":"Dataset on student youth in Berlin 1958, focusing on young adults in higher education and their social and political attitudes in the late 1950s."}]}
